creator: reed@scit.us
text:
Nvidia releases beta drivers for FreeBSD.  Would it be possible to add a
x11/nvidia-driver-devel port that will install the beta drivers?

This is important because the beta driver has support for some of the new
features of Gnome 2.16, but the normal driver does not.  Also in the recent
security scare over the nvidia driver, the beta driver already had already
fixed the problem.

Beta Driver Information:

http://www.nzone.com/object/nzone_downloads_rel70betadriver.html

That page lists a 1.0-9625 driver although another page lists a more recent
driver: http://www.nvidia.com/object/freebsd_archive.html
